name: Josidog Agilo Sport 15kg
shortDescription: The right nourishment for boisterous dogs! Josera Agilo Sport is a very easily digestible dog food for adult dogs with high energy requirements. The gluten-free recipe provides athletic dogs with valuable fatty acids and all the important nutrients.
description: The right nourishment for boisterous dogs! Josera Agilo Sport is a very easily digestible dog food for adult dogs with high energy requirements. The gluten-free recipe provides athletic dogs with valuable fatty acids and all the important nutrients. Complete food for four-legged athletes and very active dogs Complete feed for adult dogs. Composition: dried poultry protein; rice; whole grain corn; poultry fat; beet fibre; hydrolysed poultry protein; dried salmon; minerals; hydrolysed vegetable protein; yeast; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus) Complete food for four-legged athletes and very active dogs Valuable fatty acids for healthy skin and a glossy coat 81 % of the protein is animal protein. With all important nutrients A sports menu for very active dogs Meets high energy requirements. Protein …………………… 26% Fat Content ……………..16% crude fiber …………….. 2.1% Calcium …………………. 6.8% Phosphorus ……………. 1.55% Sodium ……………………. 1.00% Metabollsable energy: 16.2 MJ/kg …………………….. kcal/kg 3.375   FEEDING RECOMMENDATION Amount of feed to be fed in 24hrs to an Adult Dog. Weight from to 5 kg 60 g 90 g 10 kg 100 g 160 g 20 kg 170 g 290 g 30 kg 230 g 380 g 40 kg 280 g 490 g 60 kg 390 g 640 g 80 kg 480 g 800 g Please keep in mind that the recommended amounts are only a rough indication and should be adapted to the individual dog’s feeding needs and activity level. The recommended amount of food is per pet per day.
